disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: New hantavirus infection confirmed in Hondius crew member isolated in Netherlands - NL Times

updates.body_en: No Ebola cases in Canada and no new hantavirus cases, chief public health officer says CBC Canada’s chief public health officer delivers updates on hantavirus, Ebola Radio-Canada Little risk for Canadians from Ebola, hantavirus; Danielle Smith's impassioned plea for Canada; and more National Post
